attacking_style: Rarely initiates explosive attacks; prefers measured, sustainable efforts. When attacking, does so late in stages for tactical positioning rather than distant moves (e.g., late attack at 2020 Dauphiné, opportunistic break for KOM points).
team_tactics: Frequently isolated on key climbs when team support is critical. BMC/Trek domestique support has repeatedly failed to deliver positioning, forcing solo chases and defensive riding without numerical advantage.
terrain_preference: Strong time trialist (beat Froome by 37s, Martin by 12s in 2017). Can match elite climbers' accelerations until final 200m but lacks explosive finishing kick. Struggles in poor weather conditions.
vulnerability: Prone to illness-related abandonments (2022 Giro gastroenteritis, 2022 Catalunya illness). Hesitates when counterattacked, losing time through indecision rather than physical weakness. Poor weather adaptation evident.
key_patterns: Illness forces race abandonments: documented withdrawals in 2022 Giro and Catalunya with gastroenteritis/illness.
Team isolation on critical climbs: left without support at 2017 Dauphiné penultimate climb, chronic positioning issues.
Strong TT performances translate to GC form peaks: 2017 Dauphiné 23.5km ITT dominance, confirmed pattern.
Matches elite accelerations but fades final 200m: 2020 Tour matched Pogačar/Roglič until finale kick.
Evolved tactical maturity with age: 2021 prioritized time bonuses over stage wins, showed restraint at 36.
Hesitates under pressure: 2017 Tour locked up when Martin counterattacked, chronic seconds-losing pattern.
form_trajectory: negative: Two illness-related abandonments in 2022 followed by no subsequent race observations suggest persistent health/form issues that prevented grand tour completion
